# Hi, I'm Prince Israel

I research and build decentralized distributed systems, communication protocols, virtual machines, data-intensive and compute-intensive systems. I think of myself as a bridge between protocol engineers and developers building decentralized systems, parallel compute, systems engineering and research.

I am a member of the [Solana Turbine](https://x.com/solanaturbine) team where I have been focused on driving technological innovations within the developer and research community. My primary projects have been related to protocol research, distributed computing systems, p2p protocols, cryptography and quantum computing systems. I currently serve the team as the research operations and programs lead. 
I also work with [Solana foundation](https://x.com/SolanaFndn) to research and improve painpoints on Solana's devEx landscape, build prototype technical demos/how-tos, and maintain [solanastackexchange](https://solana.stackexchange.com/users/32724/aseneca).
